2008.issue: [S2008] Version 0.4.14 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3014.issue: [S3014] "test-and-release.yml": job "adapter-tests" should declare "needs: check-and-lint" to run after linting.

3018.issue: [S3018] "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" is missing required permissions "contents: write" and "id-token: write" at job level. Trusted publishing will not work without them.

3019.issue: [W3019] "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" step using "ioBroker/testing-action-deploy@v1" has "npm-token" parameter specified. Trusted publishing will not work while "npm-token" is set.

3020.issue: [E3020] "test-and-release.yml": job "check-and-lint" uses node.js 20 which is below the minimum required version 22. Please update to node.js 24.

3022.issue: [E3022] "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" uses node.js 16 which is below the minimum required version 24. Please update to node.js 24.

3025.issue: [E3025] "test-and-release.yml": job "adapter-tests" matrix is missing required node.js version 24. Tests with node.js 24 are required.

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.

0069.issue: [W0069] The following dependencies require a node.js version incompatible with the adapter's minimum (node 18.0.0): @opentelemetry/context-async-hooks (requires node: "^18.19.0 || >=20.6.0"), @opentelemetry/core (requires node: "^18.19.0 || >=20.6.0"), @opentelemetry/instrumentation (requires node: "^18.19.0 || >=20.6.0"), @opentelemetry/instrumentation-amqplib (requires node: "^18.19.0 || >=20.6.0"), @opentelemetry/instrumentation-connect (requires node: "^18.19.0 || >=20.6.0"), @opentelemetry/instrumentation-dataloader (requires node: "^18.19.0 || >=20.6.0"), @opentelemetry/instrumentation-express (requires node: "^18.19.0 || >=20.6.0"), @opentelemetry/instrumentation-fs (requires node: "^18.19.0 || >=20.6.0"), @opentelemetry/instrumentation-generic-pool (requires node: "^18.19.0 || >=20.6.0"), @opentelemetry/instrumentation-graphql (requires node: "^18.19.0 || >=20.6.0") and 21 more. Please increase the engines.node requirement at [package.json](https://github.com/DrozmotiX/ioBroker.sourceanalytix/blob/master/package.json) or update/replace the incompatible dependencies.
